nws_periods.name: Overnight
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. East wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_periods.name: Saturday
nws_periods.shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog between 7am and 10am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 82. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_periods.name: Saturday Night
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 65. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_periods.name: Sunday
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 1pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny, with a high near 85. Southeast wind 10 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws_periods.name: Sunday Night
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 70. South wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.
